description: Rappi Mexico CLI - browse public restaurants, stores, and product catalog from rappi.com.mx

tools.name: catalog_browse_letter
tools.description: Browse the product catalog indexed by initial letter and page number. Required: letter, page. Returns array of product_link.

tools.name: promotions_list
tools.description: Public promotions landing page. Returns the promotions_page.

tools.name: restaurants_get
tools.description: Fetch the restaurant detail page (name, cuisine, address, hours, geo, rating). Required: restaurant_id_slug. Returns the restaurant_detail.

params.name: restaurant_id_slug
params.description: Restaurant identifier in '<numeric-id>-<slug>' form (e.g. 10000295-el-farolito). Get IDs from `restaurants list-city` output.

tools.name: restaurants_list_category
tools.description: List restaurants in a city filtered by cuisine category (hamburguesas, pizza, sushi, tacos, etc.). Required: city, category. Returns array of restaurant_link.

params.name: category
params.description: Cuisine slug. Known values - hamburguesas, pizza, sushi, tacos, pollo, mexicana, saludables, postres, cafe, pasteleria.

tools.name: restaurants_list_city
tools.description: List restaurants in a Mexican city (e.g. ciudad-de-mexico, guadalajara, monterrey). Required: city. Returns array of restaurant_link.

params.name: city
params.description: City slug. Common values - ciudad-de-mexico, guadalajara, monterrey, naucalpan, leon, queretaro, puebla.

tools.name: stores_get
tools.description: Fetch a store detail page (name, type, address, branding). Required: store_id_slug. Returns the store_detail.

tools.name: stores_list_by_type
tools.description: List stores by type (market for supermarkets, farmatodo for pharmacy, liquor, express, rappimall-parent). Required: store_type. Returns array of store_link.

params.name: store_type
params.description: Store type slug. Known values - market (supermarkets), farmatodo (pharmacy), liquor, express, rappimall-parent.
